summary.key_theme: 受惠於 AI 伺服器與雲端頻寬需求強勁，Keysight Technologies 近期股價表現優於同業，獲得市場分析師正面評價。

bullish.title: Keysight Technologies (KEYS) Surged on AI-Related Demand
bullish.reason: 明確指出股價上漲的核心驅動力來自 AI 相關需求，顯示公司在 AI 基礎設施測試領域的競爭優勢。

bullish.title: Buy 3 S&P 500 Stocks Backed by Double-Digit Returns in the Past Month — DELL, KEYS and CIEN delivered double-digit gains
bullish.reason: KEYS 在過去一個月內實現雙位數漲幅，反映市場對其晶片設計工具與雲端頻寬解決方案的高度認可。

bullish.title: Keysight Technologies Stock: Is KEYS Outperforming the Technology Sector?
bullish.reason: 強調 KEYS 相對於科技產業的超額報酬表現，且華爾街分析師維持看漲評級，增強市場信心。

bullish.title: Keysight Technologies Inc. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
bullish.reason: 反映短期交易日中股價表現強勁，優於競爭對手，顯示買盤力道穩健。

bullish.title: Keysight Technologies Inc. stock outperforms competitors despite losses on the day
bullish.reason: 即便當日股價下跌，但相對表現仍優於同業，顯示其抗跌性與相對強勢。

bearish.title: Keysight Technologies Inc. stock underperforms Friday when compared to competitors
bearish.reason: 單日表現落後於競爭對手，屬於短期市場波動，對長期基本面影響有限。

neutral.title: A Look At Keysight Technologies’ (KEYS) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
neutral.reason: 探討近期股價動能後的估值合理性，內容呈現中性，提醒投資人關注短期波動與估值平衡。

neutral.title: Is DHI Group (DHX) Stock Outpacing Its Computer and Technology Peers This Year?
neutral.reason: 僅作為與 DHI Group 績效比較的對照組，非針對 KEYS 本身發布重大消息。
